title: pycreus intactus
intro: Pycreus intactus, also known as the African water sedge, is a type of grass that belongs to the Cyperaceae family of plants. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pycreus intactus include its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of fever. Pycreus intactus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
